caption:
The tallest building in..

Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam - Landmark 81

Landmark 81 broke 2 records:
1. Is the tallest building in Southeast Asia, 
2. The skyscraper - Landmark 81 is in the top 10 tallest buildings on the Earth together with famous ones such as Burj Khalifa in Dubai or Shanghai Tower. 🤩
